opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My nose just started gushing blood, and I've soaked through three towels trying to stop it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been bleeding for about 45 minutes and won't stop — I'm getting anxious about how much blood there is.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 45 minutes ago after blowing my nose hard
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: seems like a lot, soaked towels
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: I've been tilting my head back and pinching the top of my nose
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: blood dripping down my throat making me feel a bit sick; a little lightheaded from the anxiety

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; dry indoor heating running high; no blood thinners or aspirin

objective_data_offered.value: active bleeding from right nostril, soaked ~3 towels
currently leaning head back and pinching the bony bridge
